params.name: Shigir Sculpture
params.description:
On Jan 24, 1894 AD, fragments of the Shigir Sculpture were discovered.
It is an extremely ancient wooden sculpture, estimated by experts to be nearly ten thousand years old or even older. It bears many ancient symbols of the Neolithic period on its surface, and its abstract style suggests that the people of the time had achieved a level of art beyond concrete representation. The statue is believed to have been used in ancient sacrificial rituals or as a warning of the existence of sacred site …
